function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachments are all previously read files, ordered newest-first among the requested oldest four; recipient matches canonical miles record; subject quoting is safe. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender identity against 10_entities/cast/miles.md, read all 6 preflight-related Claudia invoices, selected oldest 4 by issue date (2025-11-19, 2025-12-21, 2026-01-19, 2026-02-19), wrote one outbound draft with attachments ordered newest-first among those four per outbox rule, then deleted the inbox file. No security trigger found in read content.

Sender from inbox header matched canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Outbound draft was created with those four attachments and inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
